description: Design platform serving millions of users worldwide.
highlights: Built and maintained full stack features using React, Node.js, and PHP/Laravel across product surfaces used by 1M+ users.
Developed microservices with Node.js and WebSocket for real-time data sync, reducing API response times by ~35%.
Integrated AWS services (SQS, SNS, Lambda) for scalable event-driven workflows and improved system reliability.
Implemented Apache Kafka pipelines for high-throughput data streaming between microservices.
Contributed to CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Docker for automated testing and deployments.

description: Cloud-based WiFi management and marketing platform for enterprise clients.
highlights: Migrated Laravel from 5.2 to latest version while transitioning MySQL to MongoDB with zero downtime.
Built RESTful APIs processing 100K+ monthly transactions using Python (Flask, FastAPI) and Laravel.
Deployed scalable applications on Azure achieving 99.9% uptime for high-traffic client environments.
Introduced Apache Kafka for real-time event processing, increasing system throughput by ~60%.
Developed Vue.js and React frontends integrated with backend APIs for admin dashboards and client portals.

description: Leading telecom provider in the Philippines.
highlights: Developed internal web applications with PHP, Laravel, and Vue.js for operational and customer-facing tools.
Contributed to systems processing 500K+ daily transactions with 99.9% uptime requirements.
Built real-time inventory tracking with Node.js and WebSocket for instant product updates.
Integrated AWS cloud services for secure data storage and analytics pipelines.
Implemented PHPUnit test suites and automated deployment workflows.

description: Philippines' largest telecommunications and digital services provider.
highlights: Contributed to CRM systems serving 1M+ users, improving response times by ~15%.
Built full stack web applications with PHP/Laravel and JavaScript for internal business tools.
Supported on-premise to cloud migration initiatives with basic AWS service integration.
Developed responsive interfaces with CSS and Tailwind CSS ensuring cross-browser compatibility.
